parameters.formDescription: Enter details from your recent speaking engagement to trigger thank-you emails, LinkedIn recap, and content repurposing.

values.fieldLabel: I have attendee list for follow-up

values.content: Write a warm thank you email to event organizer after speaking. Express gratitude, share positive feedback you received, ask for testimonial, and request referrals to other events. 100-150 words. Professional but personal.
Write follow-up email to speaking event attendees. Thank them, offer free resource, invite to connect. 80-100 words. Value-focused.
Write LinkedIn post recapping speaking event. 150-200 words. Engaging, humble-brag acceptable, educational tone.

parameters.subject: =Follow up on {{ $('Normalize Form Data').item.json.event_name }} testimonial
parameters.message:
=It's been 7 days since you spoke at {{ $('Normalize Form Data').item.json.event_name }}.

Action items:
- [ ] Did organizer send testimonial?
- [ ] Any referrals to other events?
- [ ] LinkedIn post published?
- [ ] Attendees added to nurture sequence?
- [ ] Video clip created?

If no testimonial, send gentle reminder.
